title: trifolium globosum subsp. pilulare
intro: Trifolium globosum subsp. pilulare, also known as the globe clover, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The globe clover is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
